title: Iron ore falls amid dark mood in China's steel industry
section_path: Iron ore falls amid dark mood in China's steel industry
section_path_text: Iron ore falls amid dark mood in China's steel industry
summary:
Main
Concerns over demand in China were back in focus. This was despite ongoing supply side issues hovering over energy and metal markets. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-08-14 113946.png | assets/2024-08-14_ugylbdxj9sxslfougebmcuzwq64rag_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_950535af45dc.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil's five-day rally ended amid concerns of a potential market surplus forming in coming months.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Concerns over demand in China were back in focus. This was despite ongoing supply side issues hovering over energy and metal markets.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil's five-day rally ended amid concerns of a potential market surplus forming in coming months. The International Energy Agency (IEA) warned that should OPEC proceed with its plans to boost supplies in the fourth quarter, global oil inventories would start to rise.
